context: Tests whether the agent uses helper templates for names and labels, applies conditional with blocks for optional scheduling fields, uses correct port naming for non-HTTP services, and sets resource limits.

checklist.name: Helper for name
checklist.description: statefulset.yaml and service.yaml use {{ include "<chart>.fullname" . }} (or equivalent named template) for the resource name, not hardcoded strings

checklist.name: Helper for labels
checklist.description: At least one template file uses {{- include "<chart>.labels" . | nindent N }} (or equivalent) rather than manually duplicated label key-value pairs

checklist.name: Helpers tpl defined
checklist.description: _helpers.tpl exists and defines at least one named template using {{- define "..." -}} syntax

checklist.name: Non-HTTP port name
checklist.description: The service or statefulset port definition uses a name other than 'http' (e.g., 'redis', 'tcp-redis', or 'client') — not 'http'

checklist.name: Conditional nodeSelector
checklist.description: statefulset.yaml wraps the nodeSelector block in a {{- with .Values.nodeSelector }} ... {{- end }} conditional (only rendered when non-empty)

checklist.name: Conditional tolerations
checklist.description: statefulset.yaml wraps the tolerations block in a {{- with .Values.tolerations }} or equivalent conditional

checklist.name: toYaml for complex objects
checklist.description: At least one optional block (nodeSelector, tolerations, or affinity) uses toYaml to render the value rather than manually templating each field

checklist.name: Resources block present
checklist.description: The statefulset template includes a resources: block (or values.yaml defines resources with at least cpu/memory entries)

checklist.name: No hardcoded image tag
checklist.description: values.yaml image tag is empty string or uses .Chart.AppVersion as fallback, NOT a literal pinned version or 'latest'

checklist.name: nindent used
checklist.description: At least one template uses the nindent function (rather than indent) to handle newline + indentation when including helpers
